title: U.S. Treasury yields plunge 10 basis points as Iran war ceasefire lifts sentiment
summary_full: U.S. Treasury yields fell on Wednesday after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week pause in hostilities.
summary_public: U.S. Treasury yields fell on Wednesday after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week pause in hostilities.
